finding: `team plan` calls Broker decision directly and treats any shared-file conflict as a global `broker-conflict-blocked`, without consuming the canonical per-file queue or retaining the task's disjoint private paths.
expectedBehavior: Team plan/start must use the same queue-aware admission projection as `next --claim`: queued shared paths stay blocked, while the role runtime receives only its private allowed files; a team with no private paths remains blocked.
evidenceOrRepro: Live `team plan --task TASK-TEAM-0079 --team-size L5` correctly found shared backlog/map files with active 0075, but then denied the whole L5 plan although 0079 has disjoint broker/runtime files.
followUp: Add a Team admission regression for queue head, queued-private, and shared-only blocked; dogfood a real L5 run after queue state is consumed.
